title: Insight into Hate, Etc.
text:
## 28. Abbreviated Texts Beginning with Greed

“Of hate … delusion … anger … acrimony … disdain … contempt … jealousy … stinginess … deceit … deviousness … obstinacy … aggression … conceit … arrogance … vanity … negligence … for insight … complete understanding … finishing … giving up … ending … vanishing … fading away … cessation … giving away … letting go … four things should be developed.” The Book of the Fours is finished.
